articles.author: Jane LaCroix
articles.title: Kardashian-Jenner Family Is Growing Again After Latest Pregnancy Announcement - Yahoo Lifestyle Australia
articles.description: The famous reality TV family is celebrating another pregnancy after a sweet social media reveal that quickly caught the attention of fans and relatives.
articles.content:
The Kar-Jenner family is expanding once again!
Brody Jenner revealed over the weekend that he and his wife, professional surfer Tia Blanco, are expecting their second child together. The couple shar… [+1742 chars]
